assertion_results.text: Output must give at least one short-term action item related to testing
assertion_results.evidence: Short term: 'Write the first 5–10 unit tests targeting the highest-risk business logic (auth, billing, data mutations) — establish the habit, not coverage targets.' Action item A3 confirms this.

assertion_results.text: Output must mention the absence of a staging environment
assertion_results.evidence: Blocker #3: 'No staging environment — every untested change lands directly on paying customers with no intermediate validation.' Also scored under Developer Experience: 'No staging means devs can only validate in production.'

assertion_results.text: Output must score CI/CD at 2/5 or lower
assertion_results.evidence: CI/CD scored 2/5: 'Actions runs lint only; deploys are fully manual with no pipeline gate.'

assertion_results.text: Output must recommend a specific test type to adopt first, not just 'add tests'
assertion_results.evidence: Short term specifies unit tests: 'Write the first 5–10 unit tests targeting the highest-risk business logic (auth, billing, data mutations)'

assertion_results.text: Output must not recommend a full test suite rewrite as the first step
assertion_results.evidence: First step is 5–10 targeted unit tests, not a rewrite. No mention of rewriting the existing (non-existent) suite.
